entity.label: Chilmad
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A place or country unknown which, along with Sheba and Asshur, traded with Tyre (Ezek. 27:23).

nodes.label: Chilmad
nodes.description: A place or country unknown which, along with Sheba and Asshur, traded with Tyre (Ezek. 27:23).

verses.text: Haran, and Canneh, and Eden, the merchants of Sheba, Asshur, and Chilmad, were thy merchants.
